Package de.uka.ilkd.key.ui

Class ConsoleUserInterfaceControl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractUserInterfaceControl
de.uka.ilkd.key.ui.AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
de.uka.ilkd.key.ui.ConsoleUserInterfaceControl
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuleCompletionHandler, UserInterfaceControl, ProofDisposedListener, ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProblemLoaderControl, ProofEnvironmentListener, ProverTaskListener, ProgressMonitor, EventListener
public class ConsoleUserInterfaceControl extends AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
Implementation of UserInterfaceControl used by command line interface of KeY.

  • Field Details

    • allProofsSuccessful

      public boolean allProofsSuccessful
      We want to record whether there was a proof that could not be proven. Main calls System.exit() after all files have been loaded with loadProblem(java.io.File). Program return value depends on whether there has been a proof attempt that was not successful.

  • Constructor Details

    • ConsoleUserInterfaceControl

      public ConsoleUserInterfaceControl(boolean loadOnly)

    • loadProblem

      public void loadProblem(File file, List<File> classPath, File bootClassPath, List<File> includes)
      loads the problem or proof from the given file
      Parameters:
      file - the File with the problem description or the proof
      classPath - the class path entries to use.
      bootClassPath - the boot class path to use.
      includes - the included files to use

    • taskProgress

      public final void taskProgress(int position)
      Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
      Called when progress is made on a task. This method is called after every single step of the task
      Specified by:
      taskProgress in interface ProverTaskListener
      Overrides:
      taskProgress in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
      Parameters:
      position - indicates how much work has been done relative to the value of size passed in ProverTaskListener.taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo).

    • setMaximum

      public final void setMaximum(int maximum)
      Description copied from interface: ProgressMonitor
      Set the maximum number of steps for this task.
      Parameters:
      maximum - maximum number of steps, >=0.

    • setProgress

      public final void setProgress(int progress)
      Description copied from interface: ProgressMonitor
      Set the progress achieved so far. The parameter progress has to be >=0 and <= to the maximum value previously set with ProgressMonitor.setMaximum(int).
      Parameters:
      progress - number of steps completed

    • completeAndApplyTacletMatch

      public void completeAndApplyTacletMatch(TacletInstantiationModel[] models, Goal goal)
      Description copied from interface: RuleCompletionHandler
      called to complete and apply a taclet instantiations
      Parameters:
      models - the partial models with all different possible instantiations found automatically
      goal - the Goal where to apply

    • openExamples

      public final void openExamples()
      Description copied from class: AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
      called to open the build in examples
      Specified by:
      openExamples in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl

    • createProblemInitializer

      public final ProblemInitializer createProblemInitializer(Profile profile)
      Description copied from class: AbstractUserInterfaceControl

      Creates a new ProblemInitializer instance which is configured for this UserInterfaceControl.

      This method is used by nearly all Eclipse based product that uses KeY.

      Overrides:
      createProblemInitializer in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
      Parameters:
      profile - The Profile to use.
      Returns:
      The instantiated ProblemInitializer.

    • proofDisposing

      public void proofDisposing(ProofDisposedEvent e)
      When a Proof is going to be disposed.
      Specified by:
      proofDisposing in interface ProofDisposedListener
      Overrides:
      proofDisposing in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
      Parameters:
      e - The event.

    • selectProofObligation

      public final boolean selectProofObligation(InitConfig initConfig)
      Description copied from interface: ProblemLoaderControl
      This method is called if no IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer was created via AbstractProblemLoader.createProofObligationContainer() and can be overwritten for instance to open the proof management dialog as done by AbstractProblemLoader.
      Returns:
      true if the proof obligation was selected, and false if action was aborted

    • getMediator

      public KeYMediator getMediator()
      Returns the used KeYMediator.
      Specified by:
      getMediator in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
      Returns:
      The used KeYMediator.

    • notify

      public void notify(NotificationEvent event)
      Specified by:
      notify in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl

    • completeBuiltInRuleApp

      public IBuiltInRuleApp completeBuiltInRuleApp(IBuiltInRuleApp app, Goal goal, boolean forced)
      Description copied from interface: RuleCompletionHandler
      completes rule applications of built in rules
      Parameters:
      app - the DefaultBuiltInRuleApp to be completed
      goal - the Goal where the app will later be applied to
      forced - a boolean indicating if the rule should be applied without any additional interaction from the user provided that the application object can be made complete automatically
      Returns:
      a complete app or null if no completion was possible

    • reportWarnings

      public void reportWarnings(ImmutableSet<PositionedString> warnings)
      Report the occurred warnings.
      Parameters:
      warnings - The occurred warnings.

      public static boolean saveProof(Object result, Proof proof, File keyProblemFile)
      Save proof.
      Parameters:

      proof - the proof
      keyProblemFile - the key problem file
      Returns:
      true, if successful
